name: Ubiquiti WAN Switch RJ45
title: Ubiquiti WAN Switch RJ45
description: The Ubiquiti UniFi WAN Switch RJ45 is a dedicated 10 Gigabit aggregation switch designed specifically for enterprise networks that require redundant and reliable WAN connectivity. It connects two UniFi Dream Machine Pro (UDM Pro) or UDM SE consoles in shadow failover mode to a single internet service provider, ensuring uninterrupted access in case of gateway failure. The switch includes three multi-gig RJ45 ports that support speeds of 10G, 5G, 2.5G, 1G, and 100 Mbps, offering flexibility for diverse ISP equipment and network designs. The UniFi WAN Switch is built for performance. It delivers a 20 Gbps switching capacity, 10 Gbps non-blocking throughput, and a forwarding rate of 15 million packets per second (Mpps). The UniFi WAN Switch RJ45 is engineered for resilience and compliance with global standards. It operates reliably in environments ranging from -5 °C to 40 °C and tolerates humidity levels between 10% and 90% (non-condensing).

detailed_description.heading: Reliable WAN Switch
detailed_description.text: The Ubiquiti UniFi WAN Switch RJ45 is a dedicated 10 Gigabit aggregation switch designed specifically for enterprise networks that require redundant and reliable WAN connectivity. It connects two UniFi Dream Machine Pro (UDM Pro) or UDM SE consoles in shadow failover mode to a single internet service provider, ensuring uninterrupted access in case of gateway failure. The switch includes three multi-gig RJ45 ports that support speeds of 10G, 5G, 2.5G, 1G, and 100 Mbps, offering flexibility for diverse ISP equipment and network designs. In addition, it features a dedicated Gigabit RJ45 management port for UniFi Network, allowing seamless configuration, monitoring, and centralized control. Built in a 1U rack-mountable form factor with SGCC steel construction, the device is durable and professional-grade. Dual AC inputs supply redundant power for maximum uptime.

detailed_description.heading: High Performance
detailed_description.text: The UniFi WAN Switch is built for performance. It delivers a 20 Gbps switching capacity, 10 Gbps non-blocking throughput, and a forwarding rate of 15 million packets per second (Mpps). This allows it to handle heavy WAN traffic loads without bottlenecks, making it suitable for businesses with high-speed fiber connections or multi-gig internet plans. Despite its power, the switch remains energy-efficient with a maximum power consumption of just 18 W. The dual AC/DC internal power supply with universal 100–240 V AC input ensures consistent operation worldwide, while automatic voltage adjustment simplifies deployment. Passive cooling eliminates fan noise and reduces maintenance.

detailed_description.heading: Reliable Design
detailed_description.text: The UniFi WAN Switch RJ45 is engineered for resilience and compliance with global standards. It operates reliably in environments ranging from -5 °C to 40 °C and tolerates humidity levels between 10% and 90% (non-condensing). Built-in electrostatic discharge (ESD) protection withstands surges of up to ±16 kV in air and ±10 kV through direct contact, ensuring stability in challenging conditions. The unit weighs 2.4 kg with rack-mount brackets and is designed for secure installation in standard 1U network racks using the included mounting kit. It meets CE, FCC, and IC certifications and is also NDAA compliant.
